title: Disableportal
description: This mod and plugin can block access to the Nether and End dimensions.
body:
# DisablePortal

You will not be able to activate portals, but you can enter the dimensions using a command.

Forge 1.20.1:

![In forge mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/946e296a0cc3001d530788cfa01c510db459155a.jpeg)

Paper/bukkit 1.21:

![In paper/bukkit plugin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d0062b7e556a63f13f01e582f091ee94069cb37_0.webp)

There is no difference; the system is the same as before.

## ❓ Questions that may arise
- Will there be an update to this project on Forge?

Me: I don't know, it became very difficult for me to work on mods. And in February 2026, I received my draft notice, and soon I will be gone for a little over a year, so there will be no updates, let alone Forge.


- Will there be transitions to older versions? 1.20, 1.19, and even lower?

Me: Yes, the main transitions will be 1.20 and 1.19, but I'm not sure about the versions below that.


- Until when will the plugin be supported?

Me: The plugin will continue to be supported for a long time to come. If I discontinue support or stop being a modder, I will definitely write about it on the page for all my mods.

## ⚙️ Project plans (by importance)
- Long-term plugin support
- Translate plugin others language
  - There are no plans to translate into other languages yet.
- Backporting of older versions will occur after the final update of the plugin.
